What You Say About Us

Nessia
@nessiaxox
The dumplings here have to be the best in Atlanta. The fried rice is also incredible and a must-order for me every time I visit.
Fadi Aoude
Such a fun and lively spot! Great bar, awesome vibe, and the food was super good — the soup dumplings are a must. Staff were super friendly, and it still feels comfy even if you’re eating solo.
Hyun Glasier
So so good. Dangerously good.
Mahssa Mostajabi
Food was great, the place was lively, and the outdoor seating is perfect if you just want to chill and chat with friends.
Wenni Zyan


Northern Chinese food originates from the area of Beijing, Tianjin and little bit of northeast China.
Our main focus is to serve our customers the cleanest, freshest, most authentic food. We also want to make you feel at home.
About Us
The Taste of Beijing, in the Heart of Atlanta.
With our first home perfectly positioned and long-loved on Buford Highway, famed for diverse and flavorful cuisine, we are humbled to have become an Atlanta favorite for a variety of traditional Chinese Dishes, including xiaolongbao (soup dumplings) and more.
Visit Us

Our main focus is to serve our customers the cleanest, freshest, most authentic food. We also want to make you feel at home.
Tianjin and Beijing is the birthplace of all dumplings and buns. The shape of the dumpling is the gold and silver currency that ancient Chinese would use, so when you eat it, it gives you good luck. Dumpling is a must have meal at 12 am on Chinese New Year day but you can get them year-round at Northern Chinese Eatery.
In addition to dumplings, we also serve delicious street food such as lamb skewers, chicken skewers, and hot clay pot. Last but least we have authentic stir fried, smoked, roasted, marinated entrees, and also Sichuan entrees.
Please ask a staff person if you are not sure what to order. We’d love to help you pick out a dish based on your preferences.
Experience Unforgettable Dining, Where Taste Meets Quality And Happiness.

meta.meta_description: Experience authentic Northern Chinese cuisine in Atlanta. Visit Northern China Eatery at our two locations for handmade dumplings, noodles & bold flavors.
